title: Right to Erasure — Missing Delete Capability
description: Data models or APIs that lack a deletion or anonymisation path for user data may prevent compliance with GDPR Article 17 (right to erasure / 'right to be forgotten').

finding.message: Data model at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}} may lack an erasure mechanism.

references: Implement a gdpr_delete() or anonymise() method on all personal data models.
Use soft-deletes (deleted_at timestamp) with a scheduled hard-delete or anonymisation job.
Ensure cascading deletes or anonymisation in related tables when a user is erased.
GDPR Article 17(1) gives data subjects the right to erasure without undue delay.
